shorts.title: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​
shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.title: UGI gas line upgrades pushed back for next week
shorts.title_distilled: UGI gas line upgrades pushed back for next week.
shorts.description: CARBONDALE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A heads up for drivers and homeowners in Carbondale: UGI is pushing back the start of a gas line upgrade project by one week. Crews now plan to begin work next Monday, March 30, citing weather delays and other jobs still wrapping up. Construction will be happening Monday through Friday [...]

shorts.title: Man in custody after reported armed robbery, shots fired in Scranton
shorts.title_distilled: Man in custody after reported armed robbery, shots fired in Scranton.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Police say a man is in custody after shots were fired following a reported armed robbery in Scranton on Monday evening. Police were called to the 700 block of Pittston Avenue just before 6:00 p.m. for a reported armed robbery at a mini mart. Police say shots were fired shortly [...]
